recent_messages.content:
You are a level-2 BUILDER. CRITICAL: NO SUB-DELEGATION. Do not call any subagent. Do not load nonessential persona/research skills. No external research.

Task:
Create a concise W3 implementation kickoff packet following W3.5 CONDITIONAL-GO decision, and update existing W3 packet + orchestration loop to point to implementation lanes.

Scope (ONLY these files):
1) Create: docs/plans/dashboard-v2-phase8-w3-implementation-kickoff-packet-2026-02-26.md
2) Update: docs/plans/dashboard-v2-phase8-w3-execution-packet-2026-02-26.md
3) Update: docs/plans/dashboard-v2-phase8-orchestration-loop-2026-02-26.md
Do NOT touch any source file under src/.
Do NOT touch any other docs.

Return format:
- Outcome: success|partial|failure
- Files changed
- Diff summary (3-5 bullets)
- Acceptance check A1..A5
- Evidence (commands + key lines)
- Risks/notes (max 3)

Acceptance criteria:
A1) New kickoff packet includes: objective, implementation lane order, lane scope boundaries, required risk closures (R-W3-001, R-W3-002), minimal gate plan (pre/in/post), and handoff condition to W4.
A2) W3 execution packet is updated to reference new kickoff packet and implementation-lane next actions.
A3) Orchestration loop immediate next action is W3 implementation kickoff lane dispatch (not W4).
A4) No src/ changes.
A5) Evidence is lean and sufficient: git status+git diff+key lines only.

Lean evidence commands only (no full test/typecheck in this docs-only lane):
- git status --short -- <three target files>
- git diff -- <three target files>
- include key lines for 'implementation kickoff', 'R-W3-001', 'R-W3-002', and 'W4 handoff condition'.

Constraint footer must remain intact where relevant.
If blocked, return partial/failure with exact blocker.
